title: Transfection of  Alexa488-labelled DNA into Oxyrrhis marina with polyethylenimine (PEI)
steps: Polyethylenimine (1 mg/ml ) (Polyscience Cat # 23966): Heat 50 ml of water to 80 C While stirring, add 50 mg PEI stir and dissolve with heat on. Once dissolved let it cool to RT and pH to 7.4 with HCl Filter in hood, aliquot and store at - 80 C Avoid freeze thaw cycles, Discard unused once thawed.
Per 500-1000 μl of culture to transfect: F/2 media 200 μl DNA 1-5 μg PEI 2-3μl per μg of DNA Incubate at RT for 30 min
Add PEI/DNA mix to the culture. The next day the culture can be washed with fresh media with adequate supplements.
creator: Pia Elustondo
